outputPrompt: Generate a clean patent-style line drawing of the lamp. The drawing should emphasize the product's external appearance, silhouette, structural outline, proportions, and distinctive design features. Use black linework on a white background. Avoid photorealistic materials, shadows, textures, lifestyle background, and decorative rendering. The result should feel suitable for design documentation and appearance patent reference.
consistencyPrompt: The patent line drawing must represent one coherent lamp design. The structural outline should match the selected style and lighting type.
layoutPrompt: Use clean black-and-white line art on a white background. Prefer orthographic or lightly perspective product view. Keep the product centered and clearly readable.
